question.label: Work rhythm
question.name: Does your current work schedule fit well with your natural rhythm?
question.description: Investigates if there's a mismatch between work hours and personal energy patterns.

assessment.note: The response 'not really' indicates a misalignment between work schedule and personal rhythm, a strong negative signal for wellbeing.

new_queue.label: Energy drivers
new_queue.name: What typically boosts your energy levels during a workday?

new_queue.label: Work schedule adjustments
new_queue.name: What specific changes to your work schedule would help align it better with your natural rhythm?

new_queue.label: Support needs
new_queue.name: What kind of support would be most helpful for your upcoming design projects?

new_queue.label: Task blockage
new_queue.name: Is there anything specific that's currently holding up your design tasks?

history.answer_excerpt: i want to focus on my mental health
